task_description: Implement Phase 6 - Character Classes for Plague of Danjin. Add 3 playable classes (Knight, Mage, Rogue) with distinct stats, skill trees, passives, starting equipment, sprites, and class selection UI.

verification.summary: ./gradlew classes BUILD SUCCESSFUL. No test framework exists. Semantic review v3 APPROVED after 2 rounds of fixes (11 issues total, all resolved).
